summary: Iteration 51: Regression test for GlobalAnalyticsTracker + existing app flows. 19/19 backend tests pass. All 8 frontend flows verified. Analytics deduplication CONFIRMED WORKING (4 rapid clicks on same element within 1s = 1 analytics call). All pages load correctly with authenticated session.

test_results.2_login_flow: PASS — test_redesign_ui26@free11test.com / Test@1234 logs in, navigates to /match-centre
test_results.3_dashboard_loads: PASS — /dashboard shows 'Test's XI', coin balance 385, streak 3d, accuracy 0%, XP 25
test_results.4_shop_page: PASS — FREE SHOP title, MOBILE RECHARGE section (Jio/Airtel/Vi/BSNL), SMART DEALS grid with 41 deals, 39 redeemable items
test_results.5_earn_page: PASS — /earn loads correctly with earn content
test_results.6_predict_page: PASS — /predict loads with Daily Cricket Puzzle, Live Cricket Prediction, Mega Contest banner
test_results.7_analytics_deduplication: PASS — GlobalAnalyticsTracker: 4 rapid clicks on same button within 1s → exactly 1 analytics API call. After 1.2s gap, new click fires another event (expected). 1-second deduplication window working correctly.
test_results.8_analytics_api: PASS — POST /api/v2/analytics/event returns {ok:true}. POST /api/v2/analytics/event/anon returns {ok:true}. No auth → 401.
test_results.10_login_redirects: PASS — After login, app navigates to /match-centre (Home route). /dashboard also accessible and loads correctly.

analytics_deduplication_details.mechanism: GlobalAnalyticsTracker in App.js (lines 105-129) uses document event listener with lastEvent/lastTime state
analytics_deduplication_details.test_result: 4 clicks on 'UPCOMING' button within 400ms → 1 analytics call to /api/v2/analytics/event/anon
analytics_deduplication_details.cooldown_test: After 1.2s delay, new click on same button → 1 new analytics call (dedup window reset)

critical_code_review_comments: INFO: After login, app navigates to /match-centre instead of /dashboard. This is by design (MatchCentre is the Home page). /dashboard is accessible directly and works correctly.
INFO: Analytics events go to /anon endpoint on match-centre (public page, no token in localStorage before login). After login, events correctly use authenticated endpoint when token is available.
INFO: MOCKED APIs are working as expected: ONDC Router returns mock grocery data, Reloadly gift cards/airtime have mock fallback. Shop shows 'Brand-funded' items with real food images.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 51 tests pass. GlobalAnalyticsTracker deduplication verified working: same-label clicks within 1s fire only 1 API call. Key pages work: /dashboard (coin balance visible), /shop (FREE SHOP + MOBILE RECHARGE + SMART DEALS), /earn, /predict, /match-centre (home). Backend analytics endpoints (/api/v2/analytics/event and /api/v2/analytics/event/anon) both return {ok:true}. Mocked APIs: ONDC Router (grocery mock), Reloadly (gift cards + airtime mock fallback). Previous bug fixed (analytics.js token key) remains fixed.
mocked_apis: ONDC Router (ROUTER_MODE=mock) — GET /api/v2/router/skus returns mock grocery data
Reloadly Gift Cards — POST /api/reloadly/orders uses mock fallback
Reloadly Airtime — POST /api/airtime/topup uses mock fallback
